verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque altare æneum viginti cubitorum longitudinis, et viginti cubitorum latitudinis, et decem cubitorum altitudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֙עַשׂ֙ מִזְבַּ֣ח נְחֹ֔שֶׁת עֶשְׂרִ֤ים אַמָּה֙ אׇרְכּ֔וֹ וְעֶשְׂרִ֥ים אַמָּ֖ה רׇחְבּ֑וֹ וְעֶ֥שֶׂר אַמּ֖וֹת קוֹמָתֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: He made also an altar of brass twenty cubits long, and twenty cubits broad, and ten cubits high.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki myös vaskisen alttarin, kaksikymmentä kyynärää pitkän ja kaksikymmentä kyynärää leviän, ja kymmenen kyynärää korkian.
verses.king_james: Moreover he made an altar of brass, twenty cubits the length thereof, and twenty cubits the breadth thereof, and ten cubits the height thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mare etiam fusile decem cubitis a labio usque ad labium, rotundum per circuitum : quinque cubitos habebat altitudinis, et funiculus triginta cubitorum ambiebat gyrum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־הַיָּ֖ם מוּצָ֑ק עֶ֣שֶׂר בָּ֠אַמָּ֠ה מִשְּׂפָת֨וֹ אֶל־שְׂפָת֜וֹ עָג֣וֹל ׀ סָבִ֗יב וְחָמֵ֤שׁ בָּֽאַמָּה֙ קוֹמָת֔וֹ וְקָו֙ שְׁלֹשִׁ֣ים בָּאַמָּ֔ה יָסֹ֥ב אֹת֖וֹ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Also a molten sea of ten cubits from brim to brim, round in compass: it was five cubits high, and a line of thirty cubits compassed it round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki valetun meren, kymmenen kyynärää leviän toisesta reunasta niin toiseen, ympyriäiseksi, viisi kyynärää korkian; ja juonne kävi ympäri, kolmekymmentä kyynärää pitkä.
verses.king_james: Also he made a molten sea of ten cubits from brim to brim, round in compass, and five cubits the height thereof; and a line of thirty cubits did compass it round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Similitudo quoque boum erat subter illud, et decem cubitis quædam extrinsecus cælaturæ, quasi duobus versibus alvum maris circuibant. Boves autem erant fusiles :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּדְמ֣וּת בְּקָרִים֩ תַּ֨חַת ל֜וֹ סָבִ֤יב ׀ סָבִיב֙ סוֹבְבִ֣ים אֹת֔וֹ עֶ֚שֶׂר בָּֽאַמָּ֔ה מַקִּיפִ֥ים אֶת־הַיָּ֖ם סָבִ֑יב שְׁנַ֤יִם טוּרִים֙ הַבָּקָ֔ר יְצוּקִ֖ים בְּמֻצַקְתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And under it there was the likeness of oxen, and certain engravings on the outside of ten cubits compassed the belly of the sea, as it were with two rows.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja härkäin kuvat olivat sen alla, kiertäen sitä yltympäri; kymmenen kyynärää, piiritti ne meren ympärinsä, kaksi riviä valettuja härkiä oli siinä samaa valantoa kuin sekin.
verses.king_james: And under it was the similitude of oxen, which did compass it round about: ten in a cubit, compassing the sea round about. Two rows of oxen were cast, when it was cast.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ipsum mare super duodecim boves impositum erat, quorum tres respiciebant ad aquilonem, et alii tres ad occidentem : porro tres alii meridiem, et tres qui reliqui erant, orientem, habentes mare superpositum : posteriora autem boum erant intrinsecus sub mari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עוֹמֵ֞ד עַל־שְׁנֵ֧ים עָשָׂ֣ר בָּקָ֗ר שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה פֹנִ֣ים ׀ צָפ֡וֹנָה וּשְׁלוֹשָׁה֩ פֹנִ֨ים ׀ יָ֜מָּה וּשְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה ׀ פֹּנִ֣ים נֶ֗גְבָּה וּשְׁלֹשָׁה֙ פֹּנִ֣ים מִזְרָ֔חָה וְהַיָּ֥ם עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם מִלְמָ֑עְלָה וְכׇל־אֲחֹרֵיהֶ֖ם בָּֽיְתָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the oxen were cast: and the sea itself was set upon the twelve oxen, three of which looked toward the north, and other three toward the west: and other three toward the south, and the other three that remained toward the east, and the sea stood upon them: and the hinder parts of the oxen were inward under the sea.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se seisoi kahdentoistakymmenen härjän päällä, että kolme kääntyivät heistä pohjoiseen päin, kolme länteen, kolme etelään ja kolme itään päin, ja meri oli ylhäällä heidän päällänsä, ja kaikki heidän takaiset puolensa olivat sisälle päin.
verses.king_james: It stood upon twelve oxen, three looking toward the north, and three looking toward the west, and three looking toward the south, and three looking toward the east: and the sea was set above upon them, and all their hinder parts were inward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro vastitas ejus habebat mensuram palmi, et labium illius erat quasi labium calicis, vel repandi lilii : capiebatque tria millia metretas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעׇבְי֣וֹ טֶ֔פַח וּשְׂפָתוֹ֙ כְּמַעֲשֵׂ֣ה שְׂפַת־כּ֔וֹס פֶּ֖רַח שׁוֹשַׁנָּ֑ה מַחֲזִ֣יק בַּתִּ֔ים שְׁלֹ֥שֶׁת אֲלָפִ֖ים יָכִֽיל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now the thickness of it was a handbreadth, and the brim of it was like the brim of a cup, or of a crisped lily: and it held three thousand measures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se oli kämmenen leveyttä paksu, ja hänen reunansa niinkuin maljan reuna ja kuin kukoistava kukkainen, ja se veti kolmetuhatta batia.
verses.king_james: And the thickness of it was an handbreadth, and the brim of it like the work of the brim of a cup, with flowers of lilies; and it received and held three thousand baths.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque conchas decem : et posuit quinque a dextris, et quinque a sinistris, ut lavarent in eis omnia quæ in holocaustum oblaturi erant : porro in mari sacerdotes lavabantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ כִּיּוֹרִים֮ עֲשָׂרָה֒ וַ֠יִּתֵּ֠ן חֲמִשָּׁ֨ה מִיָּמִ֜ין וַחֲמִשָּׁ֤ה מִשְּׂמֹאול֙ לְרׇחְצָ֣ה בָהֶ֔ם אֶת־מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה הָעוֹלָ֖ה יָדִ֣יחוּ בָ֑ם וְהַיָּ֕ם לְרׇחְצָ֥ה לַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים בּֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: He made also ten lavers: and he set five on the right hand, and five on the left, to wash in them all such things as they were to offer for holocausts: but the sea was for the priests to wash in.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki kymmenen kattilaa, ja pani niistä viisi oikialle puolelle ja viisi vasemmalle, että niissä pestäisiin kaikkia niitä, kuin polttouhriksi tarvittiin, ja niihin heitettäisiin; mutta meren, pappein pestä itsensä.
verses.king_james: He made also ten lavers, and put five on the right hand, and five on the left, to wash in them: such things as they offered for the burnt offering they washed in them; but the sea was for the priests to wash in.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit autem et candelabra aurea decem secundum speciem qua jussa erant fieri : et posuit ea in templo, quinque a dextris, et quinque a sinistris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יַּ֠עַשׂ אֶת־מְנֹר֧וֹת הַזָּהָ֛ב עֶ֖שֶׂר כְּמִשְׁפָּטָ֑ם וַיִּתֵּן֙ בַּֽהֵיכָ֔ל חָמֵ֥שׁ מִיָּמִ֖ין וְחָמֵ֥שׁ מִשְּׂמֹֽאול׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he made ten golden candlesticks, according to the form which they were commanded to be made by: and he set them in the temple, five on the right hand, and five on the left.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki myös kymmenen kultaista kynttilänjalkaa, niinkuin ne oleman piti, ja pani templiin, viisi oikialle puolelle ja viisi vasemmalle.
verses.king_james: And he made ten candlesticks of gold according to their form, and set them in the temple, five on the right hand, and five on the left.

verses.latin_vulgate: Necnon et mensas decem : et posuit eas in templo, quinque a dextris, et quinque a sinistris : phialas quoque aureas centum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ שֻׁלְחָנוֹת֮ עֲשָׂרָה֒ וַיַּנַּח֙ בַּהֵיכָ֔ל חֲמִשָּׁ֥ה מִיָּמִ֖ין וַחֲמִשָּׁ֣ה מִשְּׂמֹ֑אול וַיַּ֛עַשׂ מִזְרְקֵ֥י זָהָ֖ב מֵאָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover also ten tables: and he set them in the temple, five on the right side, and five on the left. Also a hundred bowls of gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki kymmenen pöytää ja pani templiin, viisi oikialle ja viisi vasemmalle puolelle; ja hän teki sata kultaista maljaa.
verses.king_james: He made also ten tables, and placed them in the temple, five on the right side, and five on the left. And he made an hundred basons of gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit etiam atrium sacerdotum, et basilicam grandem : et ostia in basilica, quæ texit ære.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֙עַשׂ֙ חֲצַ֣ר הַכֹּהֲנִ֔ים וְהָעֲזָרָ֖ה הַגְּדוֹלָ֑ה וּדְלָת֧וֹת לָעֲזָרָ֛ה וְדַלְתוֹתֵיהֶ֖ם צִפָּ֥ה נְחֹֽשֶׁת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the court of the priests, and a great hall, and doors in the hall, which he covered with brass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös pappein esihuoneen ja suuren esihuoneen, ja esihuoneen ovet, ja silasi ovet vaskella,
verses.king_james: Furthermore he made the court of the priests, and the great court, and doors for the court, and overlaid the doors of them with brass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro mare posuit in latere dextro contra orientem ad meridiem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַיָּ֗ם נָתַ֞ן מִכֶּ֧תֶף הַיְמָנִ֛ית קֵ֖דְמָה מִמּ֥וּל נֶֽגְבָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he set the sea on the right side over against the east toward the south.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pani meren oikialle sivulle, itään ja etelään päin.
verses.king_james: And he set the sea on the right side of the east end, over against the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit autem Hiram lebetes, et creagras, et phialas : et complevit omne opus regis in domo Dei :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ חוּרָ֔ם אֶ֨ת־הַסִּיר֔וֹת וְאֶת־הַיָּעִ֖ים וְאֶת־הַמִּזְרָק֑וֹת וַיְכַ֣ל (חירם) [חוּרָ֗ם] לַעֲשׂוֹת֙ אֶת־הַמְּלָאכָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָׂ֛ה לַמֶּ֥לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה בְּבֵ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hiram made caldrons, and fleshhooks, and bowls: and finished all the king's work the house of God:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Huram teki patoja, lapioita ja maljoja. Ja niin Huram lopetti sen työn, jonka hän teki kuningas Salomolle Jumalan huoneesen:
verses.king_james: And Huram made the pots, and the shovels, and the basons. And Huram finished the work that he was to make for king Solomon for the house of God;

verses.latin_vulgate: hoc est, columnas duas, et epistylia, et capita, et quasi quædam retiacula, quæ capita tegerent super epistylia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַמּוּדִ֣ים שְׁנַ֔יִם וְהַגֻּלּ֧וֹת וְהַכֹּתָר֛וֹת עַל־רֹ֥אשׁ הָעַמּוּדִ֖ים שְׁתָּ֑יִם וְהַשְּׂבָכ֣וֹת שְׁתַּ֔יִם לְכַסּ֗וֹת אֶת־שְׁתֵּי֙ גֻּלּ֣וֹת הַכֹּתָר֔וֹת אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־רֹ֥אשׁ הָעַמּוּדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: That is to say, the two pillars, and the pommels, and the chapiters, and the network, to cover the chapiters over the pommels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaksi patsasta, ja kaksi ympyriäistä kruunua kahden patsaan päällä, ja kaksi verkkoa peittämään kahta ympyriäistä kruunua, jotka patsasten päässä olivat.
verses.king_james: To wit, the two pillars, and the pommels, and the chapiters which were on the top of the two pillars, and the two wreaths to cover the two pommels of the chapiters which were on the top of the pillars;

verses.latin_vulgate: Malogranata quoque quadringenta, et retiacula duo ita ut bini ordines malogranatorum singulis retiaculis jungerentur, quæ protegerent epistylia, et capita columnarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הָרִמּוֹנִ֛ים אַרְבַּ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת לִשְׁתֵּ֣י הַשְּׂבָכ֑וֹת שְׁנַ֨יִם טוּרִ֤ים רִמּוֹנִים֙ לַשְּׂבָכָ֣ה הָאֶחָ֔ת לְכַסּ֗וֹת אֶת־שְׁתֵּי֙ גֻּלּ֣וֹת הַכֹּתָר֔וֹת אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הָעַמּוּדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And four hundred pomegranates, and two wreaths of network, so that two rows of pomegranates were joined to each wreath, to cover the pommels, and the chapiters of the pillars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja neljäsataa granatin omenaa oli niiden kahden verkon päällä, kaksi riviä granatin omenia kunkin verkon päällä, peittämään kahta ympyriäistä kruunua, jotka olivat patsasten päässä.
verses.king_james: And four hundred pomegranates on the two wreaths; two rows of pomegranates on each wreath, to cover the two pommels of the chapiters which were upon the pillars.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bases etiam fecit, et conchas, quas superposuit basibus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַמְּכֹנ֖וֹת עָשָׂ֑ה וְאֶת־הַכִּיֹּר֥וֹת עָשָׂ֖ה עַל־הַמְּכֹנֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also bases, and lavers, which he set upon the bases:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki istuimia, teki myös kattiloita istuinten päälle,
verses.king_james: He made also bases, and lavers made he upon the bases;

verses.latin_vulgate: mare unum, boves quoque duodecim sub mari,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־הַיָּ֖ם אֶחָ֑ד וְאֶת־הַבָּקָ֥ר שְׁנֵים־עָשָׂ֖ר תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: One sea, and twelve oxen under the sea;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja meren ja kaksitoistakymmentä härkää sen alle;
verses.king_james: One sea, and twelve oxen under it.

verses.latin_vulgate: et lebetes, et creagras, et phialas. Omnia vasa fecit Salomoni Hiram pater ejus in domo Domini ex ære mundissimo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַ֠סִּיר֠וֹת וְאֶת־הַיָּעִ֤ים וְאֶת־הַמִּזְלָגוֹת֙ וְאֶת־כׇּל־כְּלֵיהֶ֔ם עָשָׂ֞ה חוּרָ֥ם אָבִ֛יו לַמֶּ֥לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה לְבֵ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה נְחֹ֖שֶׁת מָרֽוּק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the caldrons, and fleshhooks, and bowls. All the vessels did Hiram his father make for Solomon in the house of the Lord of the finest brass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen myös patoja, lapioita ja hankoja; ja kaikki heidän astiansa teki Huramabi kuningas Salomolle Herran huoneeseen puhtaasta vaskesta.
verses.king_james: The pots also, and the shovels, and the fleshhooks, and all their instruments, did Huram his father make to king Solomon for the house of the Lord of bright brass.

verses.latin_vulgate: In regione Jordanis, fudit ea rex in argillosa terra inter Sochot et Saredatha.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּכִכַּ֤ר הַיַּרְדֵּן֙ יְצָקָ֣ם הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ בַּעֲבִ֖י הָאֲדָמָ֑ה בֵּ֥ין סֻכּ֖וֹת וּבֵ֥ין צְרֵדָֽתָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the country near the Jordan did the king cast them, in a clay ground between Sochot and Saredatha.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jordanin kedolla antoi kuningas ne valaa savisessa töyrässä, Sukkotin ja Saredatan vaiheella.
verses.king_james: In the plain of Jordan did the king cast them, in the clay ground between Succoth and Zeredathah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erat autem multitudo vasorum innumerabilis, ita ut ignoraretur pondus æris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַשׂ שְׁלֹמֹ֛ה כׇּל־הַכֵּלִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה לָרֹ֣ב מְאֹ֑ד כִּ֛י לֹ֥א נֶחְקַ֖ר מִשְׁקַ֥ל הַנְּחֹֽשֶׁת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the multitude of vessels was innumerable, so that the weight of the brass was not known.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo teki kaikki nämät astiat suuressa paljoudessa; sillä ei vasken painoa kysytty.
verses.king_james: Thus Solomon made all these vessels in great abundance: for the weight of the brass could not be found out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque Salomon omnia vasa domus Dei, et altare aureum, et mensas, et super eas panes propositionis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה אֵ֚ת כׇּל־הַכֵּלִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר בֵּ֣ית הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְאֵת֙ מִזְבַּ֣ח הַזָּהָ֔ב וְאֶ֨ת־הַשֻּׁלְחָנ֔וֹת וַעֲלֵיהֶ֖ם לֶ֥חֶם הַפָּנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon made all the vessels for the house of God, and the golden altar, and the tables, upon which were the loaves of proposition,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo teki kaikki astiat Jumalan huoneesen, niin myös kultaisen alttarin ja pöydät, näkyleipiä pidettää,
verses.king_james: And Solomon made all the vessels that were for the house of God, the golden altar also, and the tables whereon the shewbread was set;

verses.latin_vulgate: candelabra quoque cum lucernis suis ut lucerent ante oraculum juxta ritum ex auro purissimo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַמְּנֹר֞וֹת וְנֵרֹֽתֵיהֶ֗ם לְבַעֲרָ֧ם כַּמִּשְׁפָּ֛ט לִפְנֵ֥י הַדְּבִ֖יר זָהָ֥ב סָגֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The candlesticks also of most pure gold with their lamps to give light before the oracle, according to the manner.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kynttiläjalat lamppuinensa puhtaasta kullasta, palamaan kuorin edessä soveliaasti,
verses.king_james: Moreover the candlesticks with their lamps, that they should burn after the manner before the oracle, of pure gold;

verses.latin_vulgate: et florentia quædam, et lucernas, et forcipes aureos : omnia de auro mundissimo facta sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַפֶּ֧רַח וְהַנֵּר֛וֹת וְהַמֶּלְקַחַ֖יִם זָהָ֑ב ה֖וּא מִכְל֥וֹת זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And certain flowers, and lamps, and golden tongs: all were made of the finest gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kukkaiset ja lamput, ja kynttilän niistimet olivat kullasta: ne olivat kokonansa kullasta;
verses.king_james: And the flowers, and the lamps, and the tongs, made he of gold, and that perfect gold;

verses.latin_vulgate: Thymiateria quoque, et thuribula, et phialas, et mortariola ex auro purissimo. Et ostia cælavit templi interioris, id est, in Sancta sanctorum : et ostia templi forinsecus aurea. Sicque completum est omne opus quod fecit Salomon in domo Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַֽמְזַמְּר֧וֹת וְהַמִּזְרָק֛וֹת וְהַכַּפּ֥וֹת וְהַמַּחְתּ֖וֹת זָהָ֣ב סָג֑וּר וּפֶ֣תַח הַ֠בַּ֠יִת דַּלְתוֹתָ֨יו הַפְּנִימִיּ֜וֹת לְקֹ֣דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁ֗ים וְדַלְתֵ֥י הַבַּ֛יִת לַֽהֵיכָ֖ל זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The vessels also for the perfumes, and the censers, and the bowls, and the mortars, of pure gold. And he graved the doors of the inner temple, that is, for the holy of holies: and the doors of the temple without were of gold. And thus all the work was finished which Solomon made in the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja veitset, maljat, lusikat ja sammuttimet olivat puhtaasta kullasta, ja läpikäytävä, ja hänen ovensa sisimäiseltä puolelta sitä kaikkein pyhintä, ja ovet templin huoneesen olivat kullasta.
verses.king_james: And the snuffers, and the basons, and the spoons, and the censers, of pure gold: and the entry of the house, the inner doors thereof for the most holy place, and the doors of the house of the temple, were of gold.
